title: MCMC Sampling Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling, highlighting the proposal, evaluation, and acceptance/rejection steps.
relationships: θ_t is used by Q to generate a θ*
θ* is evaluated by P(θ*) and compared to P(θ_t) to calculate α
A random decision based on α determines if θ* is accepted to become θ_t+1 or rejected, making θ_t+1 = θ_t
